/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fltk-options.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/fltk-options.dir/fltk-options.cxx.o" -o ../bin/fltk-options   -L/home/jan/projects/git/serial-experiments/graphics/fltk/simple_window/build/_deps/fltk-build/src/../lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jan/projects/git/serial-experiments/graphics/fltk/simple_window/build/_deps/fltk-build/src/../lib: ../lib/libfltk.a /usr/lib/libdl.a /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so /usr/lib/libXinerama.so /usr/lib/libXfixes.so /usr/lib/libXcursor.so /usr/lib/libXrender.so /usr/lib64/libpangocairo-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libpango-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib64/libglib-2.0.so /usr/lib64/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib64/libcairo.so /usr/lib64/libwayland-egl.so /usr/lib64/libwayland-client.so -lm /usr/lib64/libEGL.so /usr/lib64/libgtk-3.so /usr/lib64/libgdk-3.so /usr/lib64/libz.so /usr/lib64/libatk-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libcairo-gobject.so /usr/lib64/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so /usr/lib64/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib64/libwayland-cursor.so /usr/lib64/libxkbcommon.so /usr/lib64/libdbus-1.so
